title: Building Nexus
description: A mod that adds lots of block to build.
body:
Building Nexus
 

Building Nexus is a mod about building. In this mod you will find many blocks to build beautifull things in your worlds.

 

The mod will be updated regularly to implement many more blocks and correcting bugs if there are any.

Feel free to give me feedback if you find any bugs !

 

For now you wil find :

Colored Lanterns with a new 3d model (model subject to change in the near future)
Floral walls such as poppy walls, dandelion walls, wither rose walls and more
A lot of pillar for greek temple for example
Pedestals to put heads
Wood encased windows
Wooden beam support
Finaly mossy rock that generate naturaly in plains and snowy plains
And finaly new building blocks :
White marble and its smooth version
Black marble and its smooth version also
A new item balck quartz to craft the black marble
